name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Provides financial assistance to rural households for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs 1.20 lakh in plain areas and Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas per house unit.
eligibility: Homeless families or those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses
BPL (Below Poverty Line) category
SC/ST, minorities, disabled persons, and widows are prioritized
Annual income should be below Rs 3 lakh
Not a beneficiary of any other housing scheme
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or online at pmayg.nic.in. Selection is done through Awaas+ app survey.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Aims to provide affordable housing to the urban poor including slum dwellers.
benefits: Interest subsidy up to 6.5% on home loans for EWS/LIG categories. Credit linked subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh.
eligibility: EWS (annual income up to Rs 3 lakh) or LIG (Rs 3–6 lakh) or MIG (Rs 6–18 lakh)
Should not own a pucca house anywhere in India
Female ownership or co-ownership mandatory for EWS/LIG
Urban area resident
application_process: Apply online at pmaymis.gov.in or through Common Service Centres (CSC) or banks.

name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides income support to all landholding farmers' families to supplement their financial needs for procurement of inputs.
benefits: Rs 6,000 per year paid in 3 equal installments of Rs 2,000 directly to bank account.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families
Land must be in farmer's name as per land records
Farmers with less than 2 hectares of agricultural land (relaxed for all farmers)
Income tax payers are excluded
Constitutional post holders, government employees, and professionals are excluded
application_process: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or through local Patwari/Lekhpal or Common Service Centres.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: A savings scheme for the girl child that encourages parents to save for the future education and marriage expenses.
benefits: Interest rate of 8.2% per annum (current). Tax exemption under Section 80C. Maturity after 21 years or marriage after 18 years.
eligibility: Girl child aged below 10 years at time of account opening
Only one account per girl child
Maximum 2 accounts per family (3 in case of twins/triplets)
Indian resident
application_process: Open account at any post office or authorized bank (SBI, HDFC, etc.) with minimum Rs 250 deposit.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: World's largest government-funded health insurance scheme providing cashless hospitalization.
benefits: Health cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.
eligibility: Based on SECC (Socio-Economic Caste Census) 2011 data
Deprived rural families and identified occupational categories in urban areas
No restriction on family size or age
Pre-existing diseases covered from day 1
documents_required: Aadhaar card or any government ID
application_process: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555. Get Ayushman card at empanelled hospitals or CSCs.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Provides LPG connections to women from BPL households to protect health and reduce dependence on traditional fuels.
benefits: Free LPG connection (deposit waiver of Rs 1600). Subsidized refills. EMI facility for purchase of stove and first refill.
eligibility: Adult woman above 18 years
BPL household or from SC/ST/OBC/Forest dwellers/Islands/river islands
No existing LPG connection in the household
Name must be in SECC 2011 data or 14 identified categories
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor with KYC form or online at mylpg.in.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Financial inclusion scheme to ensure access to banking, savings, credit, insurance, and pension services.
benefits: Zero balance savings account. RuPay debit card with Rs 2 lakh accident insurance. Overdraft facility up to Rs 10,000 after 6 months.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age
No minimum balance required
Can open with Aadhaar or any official valid document
documents_required: Or: Voter ID / Driving License / NREGA card / PAN card
application_process: Visit any bank branch or business correspondent with identity proof. Zero paperwork for Aadhaar holders.

name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to Rs 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises.
benefits: Shishu: loans up to Rs 50,000. Kishore: Rs 50,001 to Rs 5 lakh. Tarun: Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh. No collateral required.
eligibility: Non-farm small/micro business owners
Existing businesses looking to expand
New businesses for income-generating activities
No requirement of collateral security
Age 18 years or above
application_process: Apply at any bank, MFI, or NBFC. Online at udyamimitra.in. Documents and process vary by lender.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for workers in the unorganized sector to ensure a dignified life in old age.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 per month after age 60. Spouse gets pension after subscriber's death.
eligibility: Indian citizen aged 18 to 40 years
Must have a savings bank account
Not an income tax payer (relaxed since Oct 2022 - all can join)
Not a member of statutory social security schemes
application_process: Apply at bank where savings account is held. Fill APY subscriber registration form. Online at npscra.nsdl.co.in.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage for death due to any cause.
benefits: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover. Annual premium of only Rs 436.
eligibility: Age 18 to 50 years
Must have a savings bank account
Aadhaar linked to bank account
Renewable annually
application_process: Enroll through your bank branch, netbanking, or mobile banking. Premium auto-debited from bank account.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance scheme offering coverage for accidental death and disability.
benefits: Rs 2 lakh for accidental death/permanent total disability. Rs 1 lakh for partial permanent disability. Annual premium just Rs 20.
eligibility: Age 18 to 70 years
Must have a savings bank account
Aadhaar linked to bank account
application_process: Enroll through your bank branch, netbanking, or mobile banking. Premium auto-debited from bank account in June.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Provides free food grains to poor families under the National Food Security Act.
benefits: 5 kg of free food grains (wheat/rice) per person per month under NFSA. No charge - completely free.
eligibility: Beneficiaries covered under National Food Security Act (NFSA)
Priority Households (PHH) and Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) cardholders
Valid ration card holders
documents_required: Aadhaar card for eKYC at ration shop
application_process: Collect from the designated Fair Price Shop (ration shop) using ration card and Aadhaar biometric authentication.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST Students
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Tribal Affairs
description: Financial assistance to SC/ST students studying in Class 9 and 10 to reduce dropout rates.
benefits: Day scholars: Rs 150-350/month maintenance allowance. Hostellers: Rs 750 maintenance allowance. Book grant and ad hoc grant also provided.
eligibility: SC or ST student studying in Class 9 or 10
Annual family income below Rs 2.5 lakh
Studying in a government or recognized private school
Regular attendance
application_process: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in (National Scholarship Portal) or through the school.

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment. Minimum wage as per state (Rs 200-300+ per day). Work within 5 km of residence.
eligibility: Any adult member of a rural household
Willing to do unskilled manual work
Must be registered in the MGNREGA job card
No income or caste restriction
application_process: Register at Gram Panchayat office. Get Job Card issued within 15 days. Demand work in writing at Gram Panchayat.

name: Central Sector Scholarship for College Students
description: Scholarship for meritorious students from low-income families pursuing higher education.
benefits: Rs 12,000 per annum for fresher students at graduate level. Rs 20,000 per annum at post-graduate level.
eligibility: Scored above 80th percentile in Class 12 board exam
Family annual income below Rs 8 lakh
Indian citizen studying in regular full-time courses
Not availing any other scholarship
application_process: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in (National Scholarship Portal) during the application window (typically July-October).

name: Stand-Up India
description: Facilitates bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Bank loans between Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore. At least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.
eligibility: SC or ST borrower, OR woman borrower
Age 18 years and above
For setting up a new (greenfield) enterprise
Enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading sector
Not defaulter to any bank/financial institution
application_process: Apply online at standupmitra.in or directly at any bank branch. Nodal agency: SIDBI.

name: e-Shram Portal Registration
description: National database of unorganized workers for better delivery of social security schemes.
benefits: Unique e-Shram card (UAN). Rs 2 lakh accident insurance under PMSBY. Priority in government scheme targeting.
eligibility: Unorganized worker aged 16 to 59 years
Not a member of EPFO or ESIC
Not an income tax payer
Working as daily wage laborer, domestic worker, street vendor, migrant worker, gig worker, etc.
application_process: Self-register at eshram.gov.in or through Common Service Centres (CSC). Process takes about 5 minutes.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Support scheme for traditional artisans and craftspeople (Vishwakarmas) to enhance quality and reach of their products.
benefits: Recognition certificate and PM Vishwakarma ID. Rs 15,000 toolkit incentive. Credit support: Rs 1 lakh (1st tranche) and Rs 2 lakh (2nd tranche) at 5% interest rate. Skill training stipend of Rs 500/day.
eligibility: Artisan or craftsperson working in one of 18 trades (carpenter, blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, cobbler, etc.)
Aged 18 years or above
Working with hands and tools in the family occupation
Enrolled on e-Shram portal
Not a government employee or income tax payer
documents_required: Ration card or self-declaration of trade
application_process: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in or through Common Service Centres. Gram Panchayat and Urban Local Bodies help with registration.

name: POSHAN Abhiyaan (PM's Overarching Scheme for Holistic Nourishment)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Mission to improve nutritional outcomes for children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.
benefits: Supplementary nutrition through Anganwadi. Growth monitoring. Nutrition counselling. Rs 6,000 maternity benefit under PMMVY.
eligibility: Pregnant women and lactating mothers
Children up to 6 years of age
Adolescent girls in certain states
Registered at Anganwadi Centre
documents_required: Bank account for PMMVY maternity benefit
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre. Contact ASHA worker or Anganwadi Worker for enrollment.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides short-term credit to farmers for agricultural needs at subsidized interest rates.
benefits: Credit limit up to Rs 3 lakh at 7% interest rate (effective 4% with interest subvention). Flexible repayment aligned with harvest season. Covers crop loans, post-harvest expenses, and allied activities,low interest loans for farmers, agricultural credit, farm loans
eligibility: Farmers (owner cultivators, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees)
Self Help Groups and Joint Liability Groups of farmers
No minimum land holding requirement
Valid land records or tenancy agreement
application_process: Apply at any nationalized bank, cooperative bank, or regional rural bank. PM-KISAN beneficiaries can apply through Saturation Drive.
